meaning: n.地中海(=Mediterranean sea,位于欧,亚,非三大洲之间),地中海沿岸的居民adj.地中海的,地中海民族的
examples: Barcelona has become one of the most dynamic and prosperous cities in the Mediterranean.
Chef Idris Caldora offers an inspired menu that captures the spirit of the Mediterranean.
You have the choice of night fishing in the Mediterranean, or windsurfing on a lake in Switzerland.
The relationship between natural and social environment and cultural values of Southeast Mediterranean peoples.
Several studies have linked the Mediterranean diet with a reduced risk of heart disease.
